faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in New Hyde Park typically ranges from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We employ integrated pest management techniques including strategic trap placement, exclusion work to seal entry points, sanitation recommendations, and safe rodenticides when necessary. faqs.question: Do you guarantee your mouse extermination services in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a service guarantee. If mice return within the warranty period following treatment, we'll come back at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing maintenance plans to keep your New Hyde Park property rodent-free throughout the year.
